message:
🐛 Fix Übersicht widget undefined state error (#538)

* ✨ Enhance AI Node Offline Detection with predictive failure system

- Add backend prediction worker with multi-provider AI support
- Add metrics history tracking (24hr retention, 10-min intervals)
- Add Prometheus metrics export for predictions
- Add prediction settings UI (enable, interval, confidence)
- Add feedback system for prediction accuracy tracking
- Integrate token tracking with navbar counter
- Support consensus mode for multi-provider validation
- Rename card back to 'AI Node Offline Detection'

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix Übersicht widget undefined state error

Add guard for undefined state before initial state is set up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
